title: 幽霊騒ぎも風水で解決！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, I head back to the academy to pick up
something I forgot... only to be suddenly pinned
down by multiple shadowy figures!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Voice
text_block_list.text: Phew! We got you, ghost! Oh, but please don't curse me, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Elegant Voice
text_block_list.text:
The way you're crying at the academy every
night, you must be very sad, right? Tell us
everything so you can rest in peace!
choice_data_list: I'm not a ghost! What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Familiar Voice
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second! I think I know this person! Could it
be... Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It is you! Sorry for jumping on you like that!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Sorry! We were ghost hunting, and we saw a
figure that was a bit ghostly, so we just went for
it...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There's a rumor going around recently that if you
go to our classroom at night, you can hear a
ghost sobbing.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A lot of people are scared... so Kita and I came to
ask the ghost to move on to the afterlife.
choice_data_list: Okay... So what are you doing here, Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm here for the same reason! I want to ease
everyone's anxiety and make them happy. ☆ Plus,
I wanted to do what I could to help out my
adorable underclassmen.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I guess we can't say for sure that a ghost is behind
this, though...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh! Would you mind helping us, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Given our affinity, we should be able to sort out
this whole situation!
choice_data_list: Can I go get the thing I forgot first?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Sure you can! Let's all get it together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After picking up what I came for, the four of us
head back to the classroom to listen for the
sobbing ghost.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Well... I'm not hearing any ghostly crying yet.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I hope it's not a m-mean ghost...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Y'know, it might not be a ghost that's
sobbing.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It could be the flow of qi in the classroom. From a
feng shui perspective, that's more likely than a
ghost to be the cause.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Bad qi builds up and fills the classroom, and then
all the people who spend time in there get
gradually exhausted...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And once you're exhausted, you start having
negative thoughts. And sometimes, you hear
things that aren't really there.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, if we go with the feng shui solution and clean
the classroom to let some fresh new qi flow in,
that might do the trick! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Of course, there's still a chance that it is a ghost, so a ghost hunt would be a good idea too—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Your idea's better! Let's clean the classroom first!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Cleaning the classroom would be like getting two
birds with one stone! And I'd prefer it if a g-ghost
wasn't involved anyway!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Phew. I organized all the stuff that's lined up by
the walls, and I moved the plants to the northeast
too! Next...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eep... Eeep...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't think so! It sounds more like a loose door
or window... Oh! It's that window over there!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah... This window's not fitted properly
anymore. There was a bunch of stuff in front of it,
so I didn't even notice.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We organized the environment and found the
problem!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We organized the environment and found the
problem!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Problem solved!
choice_data_list:
I hope everyone sees how helpful feng shui can
be.

I hope everyone sees how helpful feng shui can
be.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that would be nice... But for now, I just
want everyone to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to bring happiness to everyone
through feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's a wonderful aspiration! I'm going to tell
everyone in my class what happened today! I'll
tell them just how amazing feng shui is!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Jinxes that bring about sadness should be
broken... but tricks that bring about happiness
are fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Really?! Kita, Dia, thank you both so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Copano Rickey's delight at her friends'
acceptance of feng shui warms my heart.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. ♪ I'm going to keep at it until the whole
academy's happy!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Me too! I want to help all the people who are in trouble, one after another—bam, bam, bam!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Agreed! I want to do what I can to help everyone,
and what we did today... Well, it was really, really
fun.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
All right! That settles it! We're the Tracen
Academy Rescue Squad, comin' in clutch!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! The Tracen Academy Rescue Squad! I like
it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
We'll chase away negative energy and make
Tracen Academy happy together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the three of them so excited brings a smile
to my face.
